Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: DECLARE @DocEntry INT SET @DocEntry = {?DocKey@} SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DueDate, T0.Type, T0.CardCode, T1.CardName, T0.OriginNum, T0.Status, T0.OriginType, T0.ItemCode, T2.ItemName, T0.Warehouse, T0.PlannedQty, T0.CmpltQty AS 'CompletedQty', T0.RjctQty AS 'RejectedQty', T0.PlannedQty-T0.CmpltQty-T0.RjctQty AS 'OpenQty', T0.Uom, T0.Comments FROM OWOR T0 LEFT JOIN OCRD T1 ON T0.CardCode = T1.CardCode JOIN OITM T2 ON T0.ItemCode = T2.ItemCode WHERE T0.DocEntry = @DocEntry

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: DECLARE @DocEntry INT SET @DocEntry = {?DocKey@} SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.ItemCode, T1.ItemName, T1.InvntryUom, T0.PlannedQty, T0.IssuedQty, T0.wareHouse FROM WOR1 T0 JOIN OITM T1 ON T0.ItemCode = T1.ItemCode WHERE T0.DocEntry = @DocEntry

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Side: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' af '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'NO', 'Side: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' av '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Seite: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' von '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'ES', 'Página: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' de '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'NL', 'Pagina: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' van '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), {@X_Language} = 'FR', 'Page: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' de '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#'), TRUE, 'Page: '+ ToText(PageNumber,'#') +' of '+Totext(TotalPageCount,'#') )
